Smartphone-Based Semi-Immersive Virtual Reality Enhances Upper Extremity Function in Subacute Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.

items.title: The Effect of Duration of Supervised Rehabilitation on Outcomes Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction: A Systematic Review.
items.summary: A systematic review examined the association between the duration of supervised rehabilitation and functional outcomes following ACL reconstruction, aiming to inform practice and reduce re-injury risk.
items.curatedReason: This systematic review synthesizes evidence on how long supervised rehab impacts outcomes post-ACLR. For clinicians, this means you have a data-driven basis to discuss expected timelines and justify extended supervised care, potentially improving long-term function and reducing re-injury.
items.titleZh: 监督性康复时长对前交叉韧带重建术后结局的影响：系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述探讨了监督性康复的时长与前交叉韧带重建术后功能结局之间的关联，旨在为临床实践提供信息并降低再损伤风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review synthesizes evidence on how long supervised rehab impacts outcomes post-ACLR. For clinicians, this means you have a data-driven basis to discuss expected timelines and justify extended supervised care, potentially improving long-term function and reducing re-injury.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: [Articles] Efficacy and safety of finerenone in patients with chronic kidney disease: an individual participant data pooled analysis (INFINITY)
items.summary: An individual participant data pooled analysis (INFINITY trial) found finerenone significantly reduced CKD progression and cardiovascular hospitalizations/death in patients with CKD.
items.curatedReason: This pooled analysis of the INFINITY trial shows finerenone significantly reduces CKD progression and cardiovascular events across diverse patient groups. This supports finerenone as a foundational therapy, informing interdisciplinary care for patients with CKD and comorbidities.
items.titleZh: [文章] 非奈利酮在慢性肾脏病患者中的疗效与安全性：一项个体参与者数据汇总分析（INFINITY）
items.summaryZh: 一项针对INFINITY试验的个体参与者数据汇总分析显示，非奈利酮能显著降低慢性肾脏病（CKD）患者的疾病进展风险及心力衰竭住院和心血管死亡风险，支持其作为CKD基础治疗的地位。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pooled analysis of the INFINITY trial shows finerenone significantly reduces CKD progression and cardiovascular events across diverse patient groups. This supports finerenone as a foundational therapy, informing interdisciplinary care for patients with CKD and comorbidities.

items.title: [Articles] Efficacy and safety of retatrutide, a GIP, GLP-1, and glucagon receptor agonist, in people with type 2 diabetes and inadequate glycaemic control with diet and exercise (TRANSCEND-T2D-1): a double-blind, randomised, phase 3 trial
items.summary: A Phase 3 RCT (TRANSCEND-T2D-1) showed retatrutide, a GIP/GLP-1/glucagon receptor agonist, significantly improved glycemic control and reduced bodyweight in adults with type 2 diabetes.
items.curatedReason: This Phase 3 RCT (TRANSCEND-T2D-1) demonstrates retatrutide's efficacy in improving glycemic control and reducing weight in Type 2 diabetes. Its dual action (GIP/GLP-1/glucagon agonism) offers a promising new therapeutic avenue, relevant for PTs managing patients with metabolic syndrome or obesity.
items.titleZh: [文章] Retatrutide（GIP、GLP-1和胰高糖素受体激动剂）在2型糖尿病患者中的疗效与安全性：一项双盲、随机、III期试验
items.summaryZh: 一项III期随机对照试验（TRANSCEND-T2D-1）结果显示，Retatrutide（一种GIP、GLP-1和胰高糖素受体激动剂）在饮食和运动控制不佳的2型糖尿病成人中，能显著改善血糖控制和减轻体重，显示了其作为潜在治疗手段的价值。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Phase 3 RCT (TRANSCEND-T2D-1) demonstrates retatrutide's efficacy in improving glycemic control and reducing weight in Type 2 diabetes. Its dual action (GIP/GLP-1/glucagon agonism) offers a promising new therapeutic avenue, relevant for PTs managing patients with metabolic syndrome or obesity.

items.title: Randomised three-armed trial investigation of the Copenhagen Achilles tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA) for individualised treatment of acute Achilles tendon rupture
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial is investigating whether an individualized treatment algorithm (CARTA) for acute Achilles tendon rupture is superior to default operative or non-operative strategies.
items.curatedReason: This RCT compares an individualized treatment algorithm (CARTA) for Achilles tendon rupture against standard operative/non-operative care. If CARTA proves superior, it signifies a shift towards personalized rehabilitation strategies, optimizing outcomes for this common injury.
items.titleZh: 随机三臂试验调查Copenhagen跟腱断裂治疗算法（CARTA）在急性跟腱断裂个体化治疗中的应用
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验正在评估，针对急性跟腱断裂的个体化治疗算法（CARTA）是否优于默认的手术或非手术策略，旨在优化该损伤的治疗效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compares an individualized treatment algorithm (CARTA) for Achilles tendon rupture against standard operative/non-operative care. If CARTA proves superior, it signifies a shift towards personalized rehabilitation strategies, optimizing outcomes for this common injury.

items.title: Long-term resistance training with all-cause and cause-specific mortality: assessing dose-response and joint associations with aerobic physical activity
items.summary: A study assessing resistance training's association with all-cause and cause-specific mortality found dose-response relationships and joint effects with aerobic activity, supporting its role in longevity.
items.curatedReason: This study examines long-term mortality risk associated with resistance training, including dose-response and joint effects with aerobic activity. It strongly supports integrating resistance training into public health recommendations for longevity and warrants emphasizing its role alongside aerobic exercise.
items.titleZh: 长期抗阻训练与全因及特定原因死亡率：评估剂量反应关系及与有氧活动的联合效应
items.summaryZh: 这项研究评估了长期抗阻训练与全因及特定原因死亡率的关系，发现了剂量反应关系以及与有氧活动的联合效应，有力支持将抗阻训练纳入健康指南以促进长寿。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study examines long-term mortality risk associated with resistance training, including dose-response and joint effects with aerobic activity. It strongly supports integrating resistance training into public health recommendations for longevity and warrants emphasizing its role alongside aerobic exercise.

items.title: Smartphone-Based Semi-Immersive Virtual Reality Enhances Upper Extremity Function in Subacute Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial demonstrated that augmenting conventional physical therapy with smartphone-based semi-immersive virtual reality significantly enhanced upper extremity function in patients with subacute stroke.
items.curatedReason: This RCT shows that adding smartphone-based VR to conventional therapy improves upper extremity function in subacute stroke. Given the low-cost, accessible nature of this tech, you should consider integrating it into your stroke rehab protocols to potentially accelerate recovery.
items.titleZh: 基于智能手机的半沉浸式虚拟现实增强亚急性期中风患者上肢功能：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验表明，在常规物理治疗基础上结合基于智能手机的半沉浸式虚拟现实（VR）可显著改善亚急性期中风患者的上肢功能，提示该技术在神经康复中的应用潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT shows that adding smartphone-based VR to conventional therapy improves upper extremity function in subacute stroke. Given the low-cost, accessible nature of this tech, you should consider integrating it into your stroke rehab protocols to potentially accelerate recovery.

items.title: Are There Sex Disparities in Return to Sport After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction? A Systematic Review and Exploratory Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis investigated sex disparities in return-to-sport outcomes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR), finding potentially smaller differences than expected.
items.curatedReason: This systematic review and meta-analysis addresses sex disparities in return-to-sport (RTS) after ACLR. It suggests that while female athletes may have higher injury rates, differences in RTS outcomes might be less pronounced than previously thought, or influenced by factors not fully captured. This nuance is critical for setting realistic expectations and tailoring rehab.
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后重返运动是否存在性别差异？系统综述与探索性荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述与探索性荟萃分析探讨了前交叉韧带重建术后（ACLR）重返运动（RTS）结果中的性别差异，发现其差异可能比预期要小，为评估和指导患者的重返运动提供更细致的视角。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis addresses sex disparities in return-to-sport (RTS) after ACLR. It suggests that while female athletes may have higher injury rates, differences in RTS outcomes might be less pronounced than previously thought, or influenced by factors not fully captured. This nuance is critical for setting realistic expectations and tailoring rehab.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: Sit-to-stand test emerges as a powerful prognostic factor of future health outcomes: different versions, measurement properties and future perspectives
items.summary: A review concludes that the Sit-to-Stand test is a strong prognostic indicator of future health outcomes across different age groups, highlighting its utility in assessing muscular strength.
items.curatedReason: This review highlights the Sit-to-Stand test as a powerful prognostic factor for health outcomes across age groups. Its simplicity and established measurement properties make it a valuable clinical tool for assessing functional strength and predicting future health risks.
items.titleZh: 坐站测试成为未来健康结局的有力预测因子：不同版本、测量特性与未来展望
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述指出，坐站测试（Sit-to-Stand test）是评估未来健康结局（包括全因死亡率）的有力预测因子，其简便性使其成为临床评估功能性力量和预测健康风险的宝贵工具。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review highlights the Sit-to-Stand test as a powerful prognostic factor for health outcomes across age groups. Its simplicity and established measurement properties make it a valuable clinical tool for assessing functional strength and predicting future health risks.

items.title: Multimodal symptom-targeted treatment for young people with persisting post-concussion symptoms: a randomised clinical trial
items.summary: A randomized clinical trial assessed the effectiveness of 'Concussion Essentials,' a multidisciplinary, symptom-targeted treatment for persisting post-concussion symptoms (PPCS) in adolescents.
items.curatedReason: This RCT evaluates a symptom-targeted, multidisciplinary approach (Concussion Essentials) for persisting post-concussion symptoms (PPCS) in adolescents. Positive results would support integrated care models for this complex condition, offering hope for improved outcomes beyond standard conservative management.
items.titleZh: 针对持续性脑震荡后症状的 the Concussion Essentials（CE）多模式症状靶向治疗：一项随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机临床试验评估了‘Concussion Essentials’（CE）——一种针对青少年持续性脑震荡后症状（PPCS）的多模式、症状靶向治疗——的有效性，为复杂脑震荡后遗症的治疗提供了新思路。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT evaluates a symptom-targeted, multidisciplinary approach (Concussion Essentials) for persisting post-concussion symptoms (PPCS) in adolescents. Positive results would support integrated care models for this complex condition, offering hope for improved outcomes beyond standard conservative management.

items.title: Long-term risk of knee replacement after ACL reconstruction using the contralateral knee as an internal control: a National Hospital Episode Statistics database study of 135 881 patients
items.summary: A large database study using the contralateral knee as an internal control estimated the long-term risk of knee replacement following ACL reconstruction in 135,881 patients.
items.curatedReason: This large database study uses the contralateral knee as a control to estimate long-term knee replacement risk after ACL reconstruction. The findings provide crucial evidence on the durability of ACLr outcomes and potential long-term joint health implications, informing patient counseling and surgical decision-making.
items.titleZh: 以前交叉韧带重建术后对侧膝关节为内部对照的远期全膝关节置换风险：一项135,881名患者的英国国家医院病历统计数据库研究
items.summaryZh: 一项利用对侧膝关节作为内部对照的大型数据库研究，评估了135,881名患者在前交叉韧带重建术（ACLr）后远期发生全膝关节置换的风险，为理解ACLr的长期效果和关节健康提供了重要证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large database study uses the contralateral knee as a control to estimate long-term knee replacement risk after ACL reconstruction. The findings provide crucial evidence on the durability of ACLr outcomes and potential long-term joint health implications, informing patient counseling and surgical decision-making.

items.title: Effectiveness of maintenance interventions promoting physical activity following exercise therapy for chronic conditions: an umbrella review
items.summary: An umbrella review investigated the effectiveness of maintenance interventions following exercise therapy for chronic conditions on physical activity, function, and quality of life.
items.curatedReason: This umbrella review synthesizes evidence on maintenance interventions post-exercise therapy for chronic conditions. It's crucial for understanding how to ensure long-term adherence and sustained benefits from exercise interventions, informing practice regarding relapse prevention and long-term management strategies.
items.titleZh: 运动疗法后促进体力活动的维持性干预效果：一项伞形综述
items.summaryZh: 这项伞形综述旨在评估运动疗法后维持性干预措施，在改善慢性病患者体力活动、身体功能、健康相关生活质量等方面的效果，为制定长期运动管理策略提供依据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This umbrella review synthesizes evidence on maintenance interventions post-exercise therapy for chronic conditions. It's crucial for understanding how to ensure long-term adherence and sustained benefits from exercise interventions, informing practice regarding relapse prevention and long-term management strategies.

items.title: Rehabilitation Utilizing Blood Flow Restriction Following Surgical Repair of a Bankart Lesion with a Buford Complex in an Elite High School Football Player: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report describes the use of blood flow restriction in the rehabilitation of an elite high school football player following surgical repair of a Bankart lesion with a Buford complex.
items.curatedReason: This case report details a unique rehab approach using blood flow restriction for an elite athlete with a Bankart lesion and Buford complex. While not generalizable, it offers insights for complex shoulder instability cases, especially in collision athletes, and highlights the potential role of BFR in these challenging scenarios.
items.titleZh: 精英高中橄榄球运动员Bankart病灶合并Buford复合体修复术后使用血流限制性康复的病例报告
items.summaryZh: 本病例报告描述了一名精英高中橄榄球运动员在接受Bankart病灶合并Buford复合体修复术后，采用血流限制性康复的治疗过程，为处理此类复杂肩关节不稳病例提供了参考。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report details a unique rehab approach using blood flow restriction for an elite athlete with a Bankart lesion and Buford complex. While not generalizable, it offers insights for complex shoulder instability cases, especially in collision athletes, and highlights the potential role of BFR in these challenging scenarios.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Early Neuromuscular and Co-activation Patterns After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction In Males: A Case-control Exploratory Feasibility Study.
items.summary: An exploratory feasibility study investigated early neuromuscular and co-activation patterns after ACL reconstruction, identifying excessive hamstring co-activation as a potential barrier to quadriceps recovery.
items.curatedReason: This feasibility study examines early neuromuscular and co-activation patterns after ACL reconstruction. Identifying excessive hamstring co-activation within the first two weeks is crucial for understanding barriers to quadriceps recovery and could guide early intervention strategies to prevent long-term compensation.
items.titleZh: 男性前交叉韧带重建术后早期神经肌肉和协同激活模式：一项探索性可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性可行性研究调查了男性前交叉韧带重建术后（ACLr）早期神经肌肉和协同激活模式，发现早期过度腘绳肌协同激活可能阻碍股四头肌恢复，为早期干预策略的制定提供了依据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility study examines early neuromuscular and co-activation patterns after ACL reconstruction. Identifying excessive hamstring co-activation within the first two weeks is crucial for understanding barriers to quadriceps recovery and could guide early intervention strategies to prevent long-term compensation.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Accelerometry-derived physical activity following Achilles tendon rupture: A prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study used accelerometry to measure physical activity in patients during the first year after Achilles tendon rupture, exploring its relationship with patient-reported outcomes.
items.curatedReason: This prospective cohort study quantifies physical activity via accelerometry in the first year after Achilles tendon rupture. It provides objective data that can help you counsel patients on recovery timelines and expected activity levels, and potentially inform rehabilitation goals.
items.titleZh: 跟腱断裂后加速度计测量的体力活动：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列研究使用加速度计测量了跟腱断裂后第一年的体力活动水平，并探讨了其与患者报告结局的关系，为患者康复的指导提供了客观数据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study quantifies physical activity via accelerometry in the first year after Achilles tendon rupture. It provides objective data that can help you counsel patients on recovery timelines and expected activity levels, and potentially inform rehabilitation goals.

items.title: Lung Boost Trainer Versus Incentive Spirometer on Pulmonary Function Post COVID Hemiplegic Cerebral Palsy Children; Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial compared the efficacy of a Lung Boost Trainer versus an incentive spirometer on pulmonary function in children with hemiplegic cerebral palsy post-COVID, finding potential benefits for the trainer.
items.curatedReason: This RCT compares a 'Lung Boost Trainer' with incentive spirometry for pulmonary function in children with hemiplegic cerebral palsy post-COVID. It provides evidence for a specific intervention that could improve respiratory muscle strength and chest wall mobility in this vulnerable pediatric population.
items.titleZh: 肺部助推训练器与激励性肺量计对COVID后患有偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响；一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验比较了肺部助推训练器与激励性肺量计在COVID后患有偏瘫脑瘫儿童中的肺功能改善效果，结果支持肺部助推训练器在增强呼吸肌力量和改善胸廓活动度方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compares a 'Lung Boost Trainer' with incentive spirometry for pulmonary function in children with hemiplegic cerebral palsy post-COVID. It provides evidence for a specific intervention that could improve respiratory muscle strength and chest wall mobility in this vulnerable pediatric population.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Mandatory genetic testing in sport: World Athletics and World Boxing repeat the discredited mistakes of the past
items.summary: This article criticizes mandatory SRY gene testing for female athletes in World Athletics and World Boxing, arguing it repeats discredited mistakes and raises ethical concerns.
items.curatedReason: This article critiques mandatory SRY gene testing for female athletes in athletics and boxing, calling it a repeat of discredited past mistakes. It raises crucial ethical and scientific questions about sex verification in sport, prompting critical evaluation of such policies.
items.titleZh: 运动中的强制性基因检测：世界田联和世界拳击再次犯下过去的错误
items.summaryZh: 本文批评了世界田联和世界拳击强制女性运动员进行SRY基因检测的政策，认为这是重蹈覆辙，并引发了关于运动中性别验证的伦理和科学争议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article critiques mandatory SRY gene testing for female athletes in athletics and boxing, calling it a repeat of discredited past mistakes. It raises crucial ethical and scientific questions about sex verification in sport, prompting critical evaluation of such policies.

items.title: SRY gene screening in elite Athletics: rationale, science and implementation of the World Athletics Regulations
items.summary: This article details the rationale, science, and implementation of World Athletics' regulations requiring SRY gene screening for female athletes to compete in the female category.
items.curatedReason: This article explains the rationale, science, and implementation of World Athletics' SRY gene screening regulations for the female category. It provides the official perspective on this controversial policy, essential for understanding the background of the debate discussed in index 31.
items.titleZh: 精英田径中的SRY基因筛查：世界田联规定的基本原理、科学依据与实施
items.summaryZh: 本文阐述了世界田联关于要求女性运动员进行SRY基因筛查以证明其有资格参加女子组比赛的规定的基本原理、科学依据及其实施细节，提供了该争议政策的官方解释。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article explains the rationale, science, and implementation of World Athletics' SRY gene screening regulations for the female category. It provides the official perspective on this controversial policy, essential for understanding the background of the debate discussed in index 31.

items.title: Goal attainment scaling for patients with chronic low back pain receiving physical therapist care: a feasibility and reliability study.
items.summary: A feasibility and reliability study investigated the use of Goal Attainment Scaling (GAS) for patients with chronic low back pain, finding it a potentially meaningful way to capture individual patient goals.
items.curatedReason: This feasibility study explores Goal Attainment Scaling (GAS) for chronic low back pain, suggesting it can capture patient-centered goals better than traditional measures. For you, this means GAS could be a valuable tool to enhance patient engagement and tailor interventions, though further reliability studies are needed for broader clinical adoption.
items.titleZh: 慢性低腰痛患者接受物理治疗时目标达成量表的可行性与可靠性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项可行性与可靠性研究考察了慢性低腰痛患者使用目标达成量表（GAS）的情况，发现GAS能更具意义地捕捉患者的个体化目标，有望提升患者参与度和干预的针对性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility study explores Goal Attainment Scaling (GAS) for chronic low back pain, suggesting it can capture patient-centered goals better than traditional measures. For you, this means GAS could be a valuable tool to enhance patient engagement and tailor interventions, though further reliability studies are needed for broader clinical adoption.

items.title: Association Between Postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test Scores and Length of Hospital Stay in Patients with Chronic Subdural Hematoma: A Prospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study found an association between higher postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test scores and shorter hospital stays in patients who underwent surgery for chronic subdural hematoma.
items.curatedReason: This prospective study links Mini-BESTest scores to shorter hospital stays in CSDH patients. While not a direct intervention study, it suggests that early balance assessment might predict recovery trajectory and inform discharge planning for this population.
items.titleZh: 慢性硬膜下血肿术后Mini-平衡评估系统测试评分与住院时间的关系：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列研究发现，慢性硬膜下血肿术后患者的Mini-平衡评估系统测试（Mini-BESTest）得分越高，住院时间越短，提示早期平衡评估可能有助于预测康复轨迹。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective study links Mini-BESTest scores to shorter hospital stays in CSDH patients. While not a direct intervention study, it suggests that early balance assessment might predict recovery trajectory and inform discharge planning for this population.

items.title: Exploring psychological flexibility processes in adults with spinal cord injury: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the lived experiences of psychological flexibility processes in adults with spinal cord injury (SCI), highlighting how individuals engage in values-based action despite internal difficulties.
items.curatedReason: This qualitative study explores psychological flexibility processes in adults with spinal cord injury (SCI). It offers rich insights into how individuals navigate challenges while pursuing values-driven actions, informing more patient-centered approaches to mental health and rehabilitation in this population.
items.titleZh: 探索脊髓损伤成人患者的心理灵活性过程：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究深入探讨了脊髓损伤（SCI）成人患者的心理灵活性过程，揭示了患者如何在面对内在困难时仍能采取基于价值观的行动，为 SCI 患者的心理健康和康复提供了更以患者为中心的视角。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study explores psychological flexibility processes in adults with spinal cord injury (SCI). It offers rich insights into how individuals navigate challenges while pursuing values-driven actions, informing more patient-centered approaches to mental health and rehabilitation in this population.

items.title: Understanding Extreme Injustice Appraisal Phenotypes in Newly Acquired Spinal Cord Injury.
items.summary: A cross-sectional analysis identified extreme injustice appraisal phenotypes in individuals with recent spinal cord injury (SCI), aiming to enhance psychosocial interventions and future research.
items.curatedReason: This study identifies 'extreme injustice appraisal' phenotypes in recent SCI patients, aiming to improve psychosocial interventions. Understanding these specific appraisals can help clinicians tailor psychological support more effectively, moving beyond general coping strategies.
items.titleZh: 理解新发脊髓损伤患者的极端不公正评价表型
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面分析确定了新发脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的极端不公正评价表型，旨在改进心理社会干预和未来的临床研究。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study identifies 'extreme injustice appraisal' phenotypes in recent SCI patients, aiming to improve psychosocial interventions. Understanding these specific appraisals can help clinicians tailor psychological support more effectively, moving beyond general coping strategies.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Rehabilitation Protocols Following Patellar Instability Surgery: A Structured Review of Published Recommendations and AI Generated Guidance.
items.summary: A structured review of published recommendations for postoperative rehabilitation after patellar instability surgery, including a comparison with AI-generated guidance.
items.curatedReason: This review synthesizes rehab protocols for patellar instability surgery and compares them to AI guidance. It's valuable for understanding current practices and seeing how AI might augment clinical decision-making, though the AI comparison is exploratory.
items.titleZh: 髌骨不稳手术后的康复方案：已发表建议与人工智能生成指南的结构化回顾
items.summaryZh: 这项结构化回顾总结了髌骨不稳手术（包括MPFLR、TTO等）的术后康复方案，并将其与人工智能生成指南进行了比较，为临床实践提供了参考。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review synthesizes rehab protocols for patellar instability surgery and compares them to AI guidance. It's valuable for understanding current practices and seeing how AI might augment clinical decision-making, though the AI comparison is exploratory.

items.title: Community-Based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) Program for Youth with Cerebral Palsy: A Prospective Cohort Pilot Study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort pilot study assessed a community-based resistance and intensive personal training program for youth with cerebral palsy (CP), reporting improvements in goal performance, motor function, and anaerobic capacity.
items.curatedReason: This pilot study evaluates a community-based resistance and power training program for youth with cerebral palsy (CP). The positive results on goal performance, motor function, and anaerobic capacity suggest that such programs can be effectively implemented outside clinical settings, promoting functional gains.
items.titleZh: 社区型抗阻强化个人训练（RIPT）计划对脑瘫青少年的效果：一项前瞻性队列试点研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列试点研究评估了一项社区型抗阻强化个人训练（RIPT）计划对脑瘫（CP）青少年的效果，结果显示该计划在改善目标达成度、运动功能（如步态速度）和无氧能力方面具有积极作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot study evaluates a community-based resistance and power training program for youth with cerebral palsy (CP). The positive results on goal performance, motor function, and anaerobic capacity suggest that such programs can be effectively implemented outside clinical settings, promoting functional gains.

items.title: Cardiac care of athletes with disabilities: are we prepared to adapt?
items.summary: An article discusses the increasing participation of athletes with disabilities in sports and questions the preparedness of cardiac care systems to adapt to their specific needs.
items.curatedReason: This article questions the preparedness of cardiac care for athletes with disabilities, noting increased participation. It highlights a gap in the literature and practice, prompting clinicians to consider the unique needs of this growing athletic population.
items.titleZh: 残疾运动员的心脏护理：我们准备好适应了吗？
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了残疾运动员日益增多的参与度，并质疑了现有心脏护理系统是否能有效适应他们的特殊需求，呼吁关注这一群体。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article questions the preparedness of cardiac care for athletes with disabilities, noting increased participation. It highlights a gap in the literature and practice, prompting clinicians to consider the unique needs of this growing athletic population.

items.title: Make or break: psychotropic medications have off-label effects on neuromuscular performance
items.summary: An article discusses the off-label effects of psychotropic medications on athletes' neuromuscular performance, emphasizing the need to consider these impacts on mental health and physical capabilities.
items.curatedReason: This article discusses the off-label use of psychotropic medications for athletes' mental health and neuromuscular performance. It highlights the importance of considering these effects when managing athletes, especially regarding performance enhancement or side effects impacting training.
items.titleZh: “决定成败”：精神活性药物对神经肌肉表现的非标签效应
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了精神活性药物对运动员神经肌肉表现的非标签效应，强调了在管理运动员时考虑这些药物对心理健康和身体能力的影响的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article discusses the off-label use of psychotropic medications for athletes' mental health and neuromuscular performance. It highlights the importance of considering these effects when managing athletes, especially regarding performance enhancement or side effects impacting training.

items.title: Prevalence of knee pain and factors influencing its risk in ambulatory chronic stroke survivors.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Vietnam found that knee pain is prevalent among ambulatory chronic stroke survivors and is associated with gait alterations, potentially limiting rehabilitation and reducing quality of life.
items.curatedReason: This cross-sectional study in Vietnam identifies knee pain prevalence and associated factors in ambulatory chronic stroke survivors. While the location is specific, the findings on gait alterations and reduced quality of life highlight the need for clinicians to proactively screen and manage knee pain in this population.
items.titleZh: 偏瘫慢性中风幸存者膝关节疼痛患病率及影响因素探究
items.summaryZh: 一项在越南进行的横断面研究发现，步态改变可能导致偏瘫慢性中风幸存者出现膝关节疼痛，进而限制康复并降低生活质量，提示临床上应关注该问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study in Vietnam identifies knee pain prevalence and associated factors in ambulatory chronic stroke survivors. While the location is specific, the findings on gait alterations and reduced quality of life highlight the need for clinicians to proactively screen and manage knee pain in this population.

items.title: [Correspondence] Challenges in assessing statin-associated adverse events
items.summary: Correspondence discussing challenges in assessing statin-associated adverse events, in response to a meta-analysis by the Cholesterol Treatment Trialists’ Collaboration.
items.curatedReason: This correspondence addresses challenges in assessing statin-associated adverse events, referencing a meta-analysis. While relevant to pharmacology, understanding potential side effects of common medications like statins can indirectly inform your patient management and communication.
items.titleZh: [通信] 他汀类药物相关不良事件评估的挑战
items.summaryZh: 这封通信在回应一项胆固醇治疗试验合作组（CTT）的荟萃分析时，讨论了他汀类药物相关不良事件评估所面临的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This correspondence addresses challenges in assessing statin-associated adverse events, referencing a meta-analysis. While relevant to pharmacology, understanding potential side effects of common medications like statins can indirectly inform your patient management and communication.

items.title: Australasian College of Sport and Exercise Physicians edition: uncertainty in sport and exercise medicine
items.summary: An editorial from the Australasian College of Sport and Exercise Physicians (ACSEP) addresses the theme of uncertainty in sport and exercise medicine, relevant for their upcoming conference.
items.curatedReason: This editorial from the Australasian College of Sport and Exercise Physicians (ACSEP) discusses navigating uncertainty in sport and exercise medicine. It sets a theme for their upcoming conference and acknowledges the dynamic nature of the field, relevant for practitioners in Australia and NZ.
items.titleZh: 澳洲运动与体育医师学院特刊：运动与体育医学中的不确定性
items.summaryZh: 这篇来自澳洲运动与体育医师学院（ACSEP）的社论，围绕其即将举行的年会主题——运动与体育医学中的不确定性——展开讨论，反映了该领域在不断变化的医疗和体育环境中的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial from the Australasian College of Sport and Exercise Physicians (ACSEP) discusses navigating uncertainty in sport and exercise medicine. It sets a theme for their upcoming conference and acknowledges the dynamic nature of the field, relevant for practitioners in Australia and NZ.

items.title: [Editorial] The next steps for chronic kidney disease
items.summary: An editorial comments on the increasing global attention to chronic kidney disease (CKD) following a WHO resolution, highlighting the challenges in operationalizing these efforts.
items.curatedReason: This editorial discusses the growing recognition of chronic kidney disease (CKD) and the challenges in implementing global agreements. While important for public health context, it does not offer specific clinical guidance for physical therapists.
items.titleZh: [社论] 慢性肾脏病的下一步
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论评论了在WHO通过一项决议后，慢性肾脏病（CKD）日益受到全球关注的现状，并指出了实施相关全球性协议所面临的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial discusses the growing recognition of chronic kidney disease (CKD) and the challenges in implementing global agreements. While important for public health context, it does not offer specific clinical guidance for physical therapists.

items.title: [Comment] Finerenone: kidney protection beyond type 2 diabetes
items.summary: A comment discusses the role of finerenone in protecting kidneys, particularly in the context of chronic kidney disease (CKD) progressing beyond type 2 diabetes.
items.curatedReason: This comment discusses finerenone for kidney protection beyond type 2 diabetes. While relevant to broader nephrology, it's not directly actionable for physical therapy practice unless integrated into interdisciplinary care discussions for patients with specific comorbidities.
items.titleZh: [评论] 非奈利酮：超越2型糖尿病的肾脏保护
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论探讨了非奈利酮在肾脏保护方面的作用，尤其是在非2型糖尿病患者的慢性肾脏病（CKD）管理中，提示了其在肾脏病治疗中的潜在价值。
items.curatedReasonEn: This comment discusses finerenone for kidney protection beyond type 2 diabetes. While relevant to broader nephrology, it's not directly actionable for physical therapy practice unless integrated into interdisciplinary care discussions for patients with specific comorbidities.
